overview: Skeleton Swordman is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Inferno, Ruins, Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 40 HP, 18 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 5. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack3 at 180% ratio (324 base damage). Sight range 1100, combat radius 160.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 5 melee attacks. Attack1 (160%), Attack2 (160%), Attack3 (180%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1100 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1100 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 160, ability check distance 220
strategies.description: Combat area radius 160. Ability check distance 220.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1100 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
